actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 1907113015, guid: e9315cd1bd0bb624886da5b1f92c045e) matches OnSceneLoad. It subscribes to SceneManager.sceneLoaded in Awake and invokes OnLoad. OnLoad has 2 persistent calls: (1) TeleportPlayer.Teleport targeting fileID 692630298 and (2) FadeCanvas.StartFadeOut targeting fileID 263574720. MonoBehaviour_1 (fileID: 1907113017, guid: 403efda511d335c4a865b0a1f33cc9e0) matches LoadScene and exposes ReloadCurrentScene(). Triggering ReloadCurrentScene will reload the active scene, fire SceneManager.sceneLoaded, and thus invoke OnLoad to execute both persistent calls.
